framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024

LO3.1.3.note: WS3 own-threshold used the wrong variable; B7/B8 contribution unverified.

LO3.2.3.note: WS1 B10 contributes weak signal only. DT F_Q2 is the primary strong evidence.

LO3.3.1.note: DT E_Q4 not answered; Sections A-D need re-extraction. Treat as early indicator only.

ai_cft_proposal.rationale: All Acquire LOs (LO3.1.1, LO3.1.2) show strong evidence across multiple worksheets. Key Deepen LOs (LO3.2.1, LO3.2.2, LO3.2.3) also reach strong peak strength. Create level (LO3.3.1) is moderate and dependent on incomplete WS_DT data.
ai_cft_proposal.decision_note: Level is not assigned from any single worksheet. This proposal aggregates LO evidence from all scored worksheets. The researcher makes the final holistic judgement after reviewing flagged items and filling data gaps.

data_gaps.why: Core Deepen items; required to resolve LO3.2.1 and determine whether LO3.3.1 reaches strong.
LO3.2.1 application of the systematic split algorithm is unverified.
Direct cognitive items for LO3.1.1 and LO3.1.5.
Reading a given tree is a distinct competency from constructing one.
